Test scripts for the less-than operator in JavaScript, including comparisons with numbers, strings, and booleans.


## Files
- **[11.08.01-001.js](11.08.01-001.js.md)**: A test script that checks if variable `a` is less than variable `b` using an assertion.
- **[11.08.01-002.js](11.08.01-002.js.md)**: Tests the less-than operator by asserting that 7 is not less than 6.
- **[11.08.01-003.js](11.08.01-003.js.md)**: Tests string comparison using the less-than operator in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.01-004.js](11.08.01-004.js.md)**: Tests string comparison using the less-than operator in JavaScript.
- **[11.08.01-005.js](11.08.01-005.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the less-than operator with `null` and `undefined` values.
- **[11.08.01-006.js](11.08.01-006.js.md)**: Tests the comparison of boolean values using the less-than operator in JavaScript.
